prompt: People keep asking for my reading recommendations. I want to turn my list into a curated feed people can subscribe to.
Build a Bluesky client module that shows my timeline, lets me post, and handles notifications.
I make cooking videos. Build me a module where I upload videos and stream them to subscribers.
I'm reading 'The Wandering Inn' on Royal Road. Track my progress and notify me when new chapters drop.
I'm a web fiction author. Build me a publishing module where I write chapters, schedule releases, and distribute to subscribers who pay.
Take my latest chapter and generate an audiobook version using my preferred voice.
Distribute the audiobook to my paid subscribers and notify them the new chapter is available.
Connect my WhatsApp to my agent. I want to see and reply to messages from my node instead of opening the app.
I want to post the same update to Bluesky, Telegram, and X simultaneously from one compose view.
If someone sends me a WhatsApp message while I'm in a focus session, hold it and show me a summary when the session ends.

Create a bounded personal media collection cataloging module. The module is local-first, runs on a single machine, and helps users manage their personal music and video collections. Core features: add albums/tapes/CDs with metadata (title, artist/group, format, category), list tracks per item with runtimes and musician/instrument contributors, sort by group or album name, and export structured data for recording purposes. No cloud sync, no social features, no streaming. Use SQLite for local storage. The interface should be simple, functional, and suitable for personal archival workflows.

I need to craft SSML markup to make a text-to-speech voice read content with specific pronunciation requirements. I want to override certain word pronunciations, control pacing and pitch for emphasis, and handle special format interpretations like dates and numbers.

A simple bounded tool to track physical media items you have lent out. The user maintains a personal catalog of items (title, media type), a list of borrowers (name, contact), and a loan history (item, borrower, date lent, return date, status). Core actions: add item, add borrower, record a loan, mark as returned, view active loans, view overdue items. No user accounts, no cloud sync, no community features. Works fully offline on a single device.

You are designing a local-first mobile/desktop module for ASL (American Sign Language) learning. The module should include: (1) An indexed dictionary of ASL signs with video demonstrations stored locally, (2) Practice mode where users can review and self-test signs, (3) Progress tracking showing learned vs. new signs, (4) Pronunciation notation guide showing handshape, location, and movement cues. What specific data structures and user flows would make this module effective for self-directed learners?

Create a bounded quick-capture inbox module that allows users to capture notes and tasks with single-click entry, displays them in a unified list, supports lightweight inline tagging, and provides quick processing actions to move items to destination folders or apply status changes.

A personal book catalog application that runs entirely offline, storing book records in a local SQLite database. Core features: add/edit/delete book entries with fields for title, author, ISBN, publisher, year, category, and personal notes; browse books sorted by author or title; search across all fields; assign categories/tags to books; generate printable book lists or export to CSV. UI should be a clean single-window interface with sidebar navigation (All Books, By Author, By Category, Search), main content area showing record list or detail view, and toolbar for add/export actions. Keep it bounded and local-first - no cloud sync, no social features, no external API calls.

You are building a reusable dialog component module for a React/Next.js application using TypeScript. The module should provide type-safe, Promise-based dialogs for common user interactions: confirmations (especially for destructive actions), alerts/notifications, simple text input, and form-based input. Include a DialogProvider context, a useDialog hook for triggering dialogs from any component, and configurable dialog components with customization options for title, message, buttons, default values, and validation. Ensure the dialogs follow UX best practices: clear action labels, escape-cancel support, click-outside-to-close option, and proper focus management. The module should export both the component library and a service for programmatic dialog triggering.

Write specification for a minimal offline-first email triage client with three-pane layout: message list, detail view, reply composer. Local mbox/maildir storage only. No server sync, no HTML composition, plain text only. Send queue with retry on connectivity restore.

Design a local-first desktop application for personal herbarium management. The app stores plant and herb records with common name, scientific name, taxonomy hierarchy, and subject tags. Each record has a linked freeform note field supporting markdown. A companion bibliography module tracks books, articles, and sources by author, title, and publisher, linked to relevant plant records. Full-text search indexes names, notes, and bibliography. The app runs offline, stores data in a local SQLite database, and exports to portable formats. Include a brief tutorial flow for first-time users.
customer identifier (name/email/phone) → lookup → registration number + verification status

Build a bounded local-first peer-to-peer messenger module that operates entirely over LAN without requiring internet connectivity or centralized servers. The module discovers peers on the local network via UDP broadcast or similar discovery protocol, maintains a contact list of discovered users, allows direct message exchange between two users, provides native OS notification alerts when an incoming talk request arrives, optionally logs all sent/received messages locally, and includes an optional text-to-speech toggle to speak incoming messages aloud. The module should be self-contained, offline-capable, and bounded to direct user-to-user communication only—no group channels, no cloud sync, no file transfer beyond message text.

Personal movie collection tracker - local database, offline-first, structured movie reference with metadata fields (title, actors, critic rating, MPAA rating, description), personal collection list with owned/watched/wishlist status, simple search and browse, metadata import from online sources, no cloud dependency, no social features, no streaming discovery, user-owned data only.

Build a local-first scheduled browser automation module that: 1) accepts a list of URLs and visit intervals via config file or API, 2) uses Puppeteer/Playwright to launch a headless browser and navigate to each URL in sequence, 3) executes on a cron schedule (configurable: hourly, daily, weekly), 4) logs each visit with timestamp and status (success/failure), 5) optionally sends webhook notifications on completion or error. The module should run as a standalone Node.js process, store configuration in a local JSON/YAML file, and require no external cloud services.

I need to debug why my automation script is failing at a specific step. I want to capture all script events/messages in real-time, watch them execute with the ability to slow down or pause execution, and review a persistent log after the run completes.

I need to storyboard a 3-minute product explainer video with 8 scenes. Each scene needs separate video and audio columns, and I want to export a two-column script for my crew and a visual storyboard for the shoot.

You need a lightweight animation editor that creates a new animation project from a template. The editor should have a canvas for drawing frames, a timeline strip for navigating frames, basic drawing tools (pencil, eraser), playback controls, and export to GIF or webM. The module should work offline in a single HTML file or minimal folder structure.
Create a focused explainer on SMPTE and MIDI timecode synchronization for media production beginners who need to sync audio and video systems
sample pack name, preview clip list with URLs and metadata, full collection description, pricing/purchase link, brand voice for intro
React application requiring inline video playback with unified API across multiple video sources and providers

Create a bounded, self-contained interactive biography module for [SUBJECT_NAME] that includes: (1) an overview/biography section with key life events, (2) a chronological timeline component showing life milestones, (3) a teachings or key works section with organized content, and (4) navigation between sections. The module should be usable as a standalone educational component, preserving the original's structured interactive approach to presenting a person's life story and core teachings.
reference text document (file path or paste), message text to encode/decode, shared password

Create a bounded module that: (1) ingests and stores email messages with sender, recipient, subject, body, timestamp, and thread ID; (2) provides full-text search across all archived correspondence; (3) organizes messages into conversation threads; (4) maintains a contact registry with frequently-used addresses; (5) supports offline drafting with saved templates, auto-quote, and one-click signatures; (6) allows sorting by date, correspondent, or subject; (7) exports selected messages to file or print; (8) can auto-log sent messages and mark items for printing on import.
I need to calculate the duration of a 32-bar section at 120 BPM, then add 3.5 seconds of silence, and determine the SMPTE timecode offset if this cue starts at 01:23:45:00 for a video sync.

A form validation module providing reusable schema templates for common input patterns (telephone, date, credit card, email, postal code) alongside a hook-based system for registering custom validation logic. Built-in templates are configurable (e.g., regional phone formats) and the custom validator hooks accept input value, return validation result with error message. Includes a test harness that validates a schema against sample inputs in real-time without deployment.

Create a reusable custom alert dialog component that provides modal confirmation and alert boxes with more options than native browser alerts. The component should support: (1) Multiple preset alert types (warning, confirmation, error, info) with appropriate default icons, (2) Customizable title, message, and button labels, (3) Accessibility features including focus trapping and ARIA attributes, (4) Configurable buttons (e.g., Cancel/Confirm, OK only, Yes/No), (5) Return promise that resolves with user selection. Keep it as a focused bounded module, not a full dialog suite.
Convert the following text to spoken audio using the default system voice, then play it through the audio output: [USER_TEXT]

Design a bounded, sovereign mobile/desktop app for cataloging personal physical music collections (vinyl records, CDs, cassette tapes). Core features: add items via barcode scan or manual entry, store format type, artist, album title, release year, condition rating, purchase price, location, and personal notes. Include sorting by artist/album/format/year and filtering by format, condition, or genre. Store all data locally using SQLite with no mandatory cloud dependency. Support local cover art files. The module is a single bounded catalog tool, not a marketplace, streaming service, or social platform.

Design a bounded desktop application for creating printable timelines. Users enter milestone dates and descriptions, the tool renders them as a visual timeline optimized for printing across multiple pages. Include styling options but keep scope focused on static timeline creation for display purposes, not dynamic project management.

Create a bounded local-first module for tracking software licenses and support entitlement information. Include: searchable list of software products, each with detail record for license key/registration number, vendor support contact (phone, email, URL), purchase date, and notes. Enable quick retrieval during support requests. Design as a single sovereign personal database, not a team or enterprise suite.
A list, file path, or stdin stream containing potentially duplicate entries

User needs a local-first contact directory module that can store contact records (names, addresses, phone, email), sort and filter contacts, import from CSV/VCF, export to CSV, and generate printable mailing labels on standard Avery label sheets

Design a parent-teacher conference scheduling module that enables teachers to set their availability windows, allows parents to book specific time slots, provides role-based views for each user type, generates appointment lists, and supports customizable schedule exports. The module should handle conflict detection and offer basic notification capabilities for confirmed bookings.

Parent opens app with one hand while holding baby, taps FEED button, selects breast/bottle/solid from picker, taps confirm. Entry appears in timeline immediately. Parent can review today's events by scrolling timeline or viewing summary card at top showing counts and timing.
task-description, current-step, total-steps, optional-message, output-target

Create a bounded local-first sign language dictionary and pronunciation reference module. It should allow users to search for signs by English word, browse an organized index, view detailed sign entries showing production parameters (handshape, movement, palm orientation, location), and maintain recent or favorited lookups for practice sessions. The module does NOT include video content, social features, or community contributions - it is a focused reference tool.

Design and specify a bounded Python module called 'speech_io' that wraps text-to-speech and basic speech recognition libraries (like pyttsx3 and speech_recognition). The module should expose functions for: synthesizing text to speech with configurable voice parameters, managing voice settings (rate, volume, voice selection), and providing basic speech recognition hooks for simple voice input. Include clear invocation patterns for integrating speech output into other application workflows.

Create a TypeScript/JavaScript module that provides programmatic control over text-to-speech synthesis. It should expose methods to: (1) speak text with optional SSML, (2) list and select from available voices, (3) configure utterance properties (pitch, rate, volume, language), (4) manage a playback queue, (5) handle events (onstart, onend, onerror, onboundary). Do NOT include speech recognition. This is a thin wrapper around the Web Speech API or a cloud TTS service for developers who need to add voice output to their applications.
find and trigger short cartoon-style voice and sound clips for comedic media moments

Create a bounded, locally-running multiplication facts practice module for children ages 6-10. The module should: 1) Present single-digit multiplication problems (0-12 tables) one at a time, 2) Provide immediate audio/visual feedback on answers, 3) Show a simple visual progress indicator, 4) Include encouraging messages for correct answers, 5) Allow the child to select which times tables to practice, 6) Work fully offline with no account required. Design for minimal friction - no login, no ads, no social features. Focus on building fluency through low-stakes repetition with positive reinforcement.
Current video source URL or local file path, desired playback speed, target output action (view/capture)
raw text input via stdin, file path, or piped stream plus dedupe scope flag and optional modifiers

Create a local-first two-person chat application that runs without any cloud service. Users should be able to connect via IP address or local network discovery, exchange text messages in real time, view their conversation history during the session, and export the full transcript as a plain .txt file with timestamps. The interface should be minimal and focused.
Message recipient, subject, body, optional attachments, preferred transport (email, SMS, webhook)

You are a bounded desktop application for composing adaptive audio soundtracks for interactive experiences. Users compose multi-stem music in a timeline, define which stems respond to which interactive events (e.g., 'combat music' triggers on enemy_sighted, 'exploration mode' on player_idle), and export a self-contained audio bundle with a JSON manifest describing the triggers and a lightweight JS/Unity integration snippet. Do not build a full DAW, generic music production suite, or cloud collaboration platform.

I need a VS Code extension that provides three floating utility panels accessible from a launcher sidebar: a media preview panel for viewing images and video files in the workspace, a file operations panel for package management and file actions like rename/delete/compact, and a color picker panel with modifier-key behavior for generating color codes. The panels should be toggleable and persistable as floating windows independent of the main editor. The extension should be lightweight with no external dependencies beyond VS Code extension API. Use the extension API's WebviewView for sidebar panels and Window.createPanel for floating utilities.

Create a local-first interactive walkthrough module for onboarding users to an email client application. The module should allow defining sequential steps that highlight UI elements, display explanatory tooltips, and guide users through core mail tasks like composing, sending, organizing, and searching messages.

Start with topic/dossier name, then import or link source materials (documents, reports, media files) into the library. Use the overview to establish timeline and key facts. Navigate through sections using guided walkthrough or free-form exploration. Annotate and tag evidence as you review. Export findings or present the dossier.

Create a bounded mobile directory application for discovering and contacting niche recreational organizations. The app should work offline-first, allow users to browse and search listings by activity type and geographic location, display detailed organization profiles with contact information (phone, email, address), integrate with native dialer and email apps, and support local bookmarking of favorite organizations. The data model includes: organization name, activity categories (array), location (city, state, coordinates), contact methods (phone, email, physical address), and optional description. Prioritize local-first architecture where all directory data syncs to device storage for offline access.
local video file path or file selection

A developer wants to build a lightweight desktop system tray utility that monitors multiple email accounts (IMAP) and displays real-time unread counts as badge overlays on the system tray icon, with native OS notifications for new mail arrival.

Create a bounded audio capture module using the Web Audio API and MediaRecorder. The module should enumerate available microphone devices, request and manage permissions, provide start/stop recording controls, and export audio as a file. Include a device selector dropdown, recording state indicator, and save/attach functionality. Focus on a clean, local-first voice note or attachment recording use case.

Create a lightweight, standalone JavaScript module (no heavy framework dependencies) that displays custom branded modal dialogs for simple acknowledgements like About boxes, notices, or single-confirmation dialogs. The module should accept a configuration object with message text, button labels, and optional custom styling. It should render a modal with proper focus management, close on button click or escape key, and return the clicked button's identifier via Promise or callback. Prioritize small bundle size and simple API over feature complexity.

I need a compact voice avatar asset picker module. It should display a searchable gallery of voice-character icons (visual representations of TTS voices). Each entry shows a small thumbnail; clicking opens a larger preview. Users can copy the visual asset (SVG or PNG) to clipboard or download it for use in their own projects. Include filter controls for voice name or language. Keep it lightweight and self-contained.

design a local-first scheduled alert dispatcher module that sends coded SMS or voice notifications to recipients on a schedule, including recipient management, message templates, delivery status tracking, and alert history
system time, voice config, speaking rate, output format

Create a bounded local-first module for teaching foundational gait observation skills. The module should include: (1) conceptual overview of the gait cycle and its phases, (2) visual/text guidance for identifying stance phase, swing phase, and sub-phases, (3) a structured observation checklist template students can use during real or video-based gait assessment, and (4) 3-5 guided practice scenarios presenting common gait patterns with prompts for user analysis. Reference established frameworks like Functional Gait Assessment (FGA) and Dynamic Gait Index (DGI) as illustrative examples for advanced context, but maintain beginner-focused scope. The module should function as a standalone learning tool deployable on local device without requiring clinical system integration.

Create a bounded single-page interactive demo module for a developer extension/plugin. The module should include: (1) an immersive interactive demo area with playback controls demonstrating the extension's audio/visual capabilities, (2) brief product context explaining what the tool does, (3) a collapsible technical specifications section, and (4) a minimal inquiry or request-for-information form with basic fields for name, email, and message. The module should be self-contained, sovereign, and follow local-first principles rather than full SaaS architecture.

Personal article reference catalog with local-first storage, metadata fields for title/author/publisher/date/source/URL/notes, tag system, full-text search, detail view, and export to standard formats

Design a bounded developer command center module inspired by HyperCard's Developer's Domicile, functioning as a Raycast-style command palette with project-specific actions, debug tracing, code search, and asset utilities. The module should: (1) Provide a global command palette with fuzzy search for launching apps, running scripts, and executing quick actions; (2) Include a trace/debug console panel for viewing runtime logs and system messages with filtering; (3) Offer a structure inspector for navigating project files, resources, and scripts; (4) Support global code search with regex; (5) Provide asset preview and basic conversion tools; (6) Allow per-project command customization via local scripts. Output the module specification including bounded scope, submodule definitions, data interfaces, and example command registry structure.

The user needs to manage a personal mailing list for a small self-publishing operation, log when they ship minicomics to each contact, and print physical address labels that can be applied to envelopes or serve as fold-over envelope templates. They want to track who has received what and when, and set reminders for restock or follow-up communications.
Contact records with name, title, organization, phone, email, address fields; template selection; print settings
User is in an application and needs to check notifications without manually switching to Notification Center via menu bar icon

Create a bounded JavaScript module that exports a DialogService class. The class should have methods: alert(type, message), confirm(title, message), and prompt(title, message, defaultValue). Support types: 'stop', 'caution', 'note'. Support button sets: 'ok', 'ok-cancel', 'continue-cancel'. Each method returns a Promise that resolves to the user's choice. Include a demo HTML page with example usage showing each dialog type and button combination.

Create a bounded Alert Service module that provides a unified API for showing confirmation dialogs, error alerts, and warning prompts across an application. The module should define standard alert types, accept configuration options, and return normalized user actions to avoid branching logic in calling code. Focus on local-first sovereignty - no external API dependencies. Include sensible defaults for common scenarios like delete confirmations, error notifications, and form validation alerts.

User needs to verify which platform services (e.g., clipboard API, filesystem access, notification permission, biometric auth, serial ports, speech synthesis) are available in the current runtime before attempting feature activation.

You are a schema-driven modal dialog builder. Given a dialog configuration object (type, title, message, buttons, input fields with validation rules), render an appropriate modal dialog, collect and validate user input, and dispatch result events back to the caller. Support the following dialog variants: alert (single prompt with action button), form (multiple editable fields with submit/cancel), choice (radio/checkbox selection), list-select (scrollable selection list), and help (informational display). Use the parameter schema to drive field rendering and validation dynamically.
message: string, icon?: string | null, duration?: number (milliseconds)

Create a local-first text-to-speech announcement module that connects to configurable text sources (RSS feeds, local HTTP endpoints, or message queues), converts text to speech using a local TTS engine, and outputs audio sequentially with queue management, scheduling options, and source prioritization.
image source (file path, buffer, or stream)

Create a minimal single-artist discography reference module with: (1) artist timeline/discography index, (2) album detail cards showing tracklist and release info, (3) song lyric pages with clean formatting, (4) an attached notes section for histories and commentary. Use local-first storage (flat files or SQLite) so the module works entirely offline without any cloud dependency.
email archive files or directory path
video file or existing timed text file
Martial arts technique training module with embedded instructional video lessons learn and review martial arts techniques through structured multimedia instruction

Design a local-first classroom messaging module where students and teachers can send, receive, and manage messages within a school-hosted environment. Include: (1) teacher admin panel for creating student accounts and monitoring activity, (2) student inbox with read/unread and threading, (3) compose/send flow with recipient selection, (4) local storage (no external network calls). Keep it bounded, privacy-focused, and suitable for teaching email literacy.

Design a bounded self-paced module that helps internet newcomers complete foundational tasks: setting up an email account, using a web browser safely, navigating to common sites, understanding basic terminology, and applying online safety practices. Structure as interactive reference cards with clear steps, screenshots, and a quick-lookup glossary.

Define the public API surface for a compression utility module. Include functions: compressFile(buffer, algorithm), decompressFile(buffer, algorithm), compressString(text, algorithm), decompressString(compressed, algorithm). Support at least gzip and brotli for binary data, and lz-string style for strings. Consider streaming for large files. Document file size thresholds where compression is effective.
caseId, evidenceBundle, suspectList, knownClues, timeline
the user loads a video file, imports short audio clips from a folder, places each clip onto the frame grid at a specific position, plays back to verify sync, exports cue list or burns into video

Create a single-purpose command-line tool that takes a string or file path as input and checks whether all parentheses (), brackets [], and braces {} are properly balanced. The tool should return exit code 0 for balanced input and exit code 1 for unbalanced input, with a clear message indicating the first mismatch position if found. Include support for: 1) reading from stdin, 2) reading from a file argument, 3) showing the line and column number of the first unbalanced delimiter. Keep it lightweight with zero external dependencies beyond the standard library.

Design a single-page event landing site for an annual community food fight festival called 'Tomato War' that has been running for decades. The page should include: event title and date prominently displayed, a history section explaining the tradition and its origins, a visual gallery of past event photos, clear call-to-action to RSVP with options to join as participant or spectator, a registration form collecting name/email/role preference, and organizer contact information. Keep it playful and community-focused.

Keep Track of Businesses EASY! - From PeterSoft BcardDB: A lightweight, offline-capable module to capture, store, and search professional contact details from business cards. Core functions: add new contact from manual entry or scanned card image, view full contact record with all fields (name, company, title, phone, email, address, notes), search/filter by name or company, edit existing records, delete/archive contacts. Optional: basic export to CSV or vCard. No cloud sync required. Single-user local-first design.
Image or video clip of aircraft

Design and implement a lightweight, local-first IRC client module that enables users to join live text conversations across multiple channels and exchange messages in real time. The module should provide a channel list for managing multiple conversations, a message timeline for viewing message history, text input for composing and sending messages, and connection/status controls for managing server connections. Prioritize minimal dependencies and local data storage.

Create a minimal local-first module for tracking software registrants. Each record includes: name, email, license key, registration date, status (active/expired/trial), purchase amount, and notes. Provide basic CRUD operations and simple search/filter by status or date range. No enterprise features - just a simple ledger for a small developer.

You are a macOS automation toolkit that helps developers explore and test inter-application scripting capabilities. Given an input specifying a target application name or scripting task, you should load that application's Scripting Dictionary (sdef), allow the user to browse its suites and commands, help construct valid AppleScript or JXA commands with proper object specifiers and parameters, execute those commands in a sandboxed context, and present structured results or error messages. The module maintains a local library of tested scripts organized by target application and use case.
video source, playback config (autoplay, loop, muted), dimensions/responsiveness, styling preferences

Build a bounded coordinate conversion module that: (1) Accepts latitude/longitude input in decimal degrees or DMS format, (2) Converts to UTM with automatic zone and hemisphere detection using WGS84 datum, (3) Performs reverse conversion from UTM easting/northing to lat/long, (4) Validates coordinate ranges and displays clear error messages for invalid inputs, (5) Provides one-click copy of converted values, (6) Is scoped as a single-purpose utility suitable for local-first deployment

You are a bounded ASL vocabulary practice assistant. Given a target sign or concept, retrieve its vocabulary entry showing: 1) video demonstration of the sign, 2) parameter breakdown (handshape, movement, palm orientation, location), 3) English meaning(s), 4) example sentences if available. If the user provides a sign they want to practice, confirm the parameters and offer corrective guidance. If they provide an English word, find the corresponding ASL sign. Keep responses focused on vocabulary lookup and production guidance within this bounded module.

Generate a minimal static site template for a single music artist/band profile hub. The site should be driven by flat files (Markdown/JSON) and generate static HTML. Include: artist bio/overview, chronological timeline (band history, releases, key events), discography entries (albums/singles with year, label, artwork), media gallery (images with captions), and a contact form or handoff. Assume local-first deployment, no database, no user accounts.
symptom description, affected application/environment, extension/plugin list, recent changes timeline
